Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action

Class FlixelActionAnalog

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action.FlixelAction
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action.FlixelActionAnalog
public final class FlixelActionAnalog extends FlixelAction
Two-axis vector built from FlixelAnalogAxisBinding contributors plus optional Steam analog for FlixelAction.getName().

How values combine

Each frame, key halves add -1, 0, or +1 per axis; Flixel.gamepads axis bindings add smooth stick values. Steam FlixelSteamActionReader.getAnalogX(java.lang.String) / getAnalogY are added on top. The result is clamped to a maximum length of 1 so diagonals do not exceed unit speed when mixing keys and sticks.

Typical setup


 move = new FlixelActionAnalog("move");
 move.addAxisBinding(FlixelAnalogAxisBinding.negXKey(FlixelKey.LEFT));
 move.addAxisBinding(FlixelAnalogAxisBinding.posXKey(FlixelKey.RIGHT));
 move.addAxisBinding(FlixelAnalogAxisBinding.negYKey(FlixelKey.DOWN));
 move.addAxisBinding(FlixelAnalogAxisBinding.posYKey(FlixelKey.UP));
 move.addAxisBinding(FlixelAnalogAxisBinding.gamepadAxisX(0, FlixelGamepadInput.AXIS_LEFT_X));
 move.addAxisBinding(FlixelAnalogAxisBinding.gamepadAxisY(0, FlixelGamepadInput.AXIS_LEFT_Y));

Reading

Use getX() and getY() after super.update(elapsed) in your state. getPrevX() / getPrevY() mirror the previous frame after FlixelActionSet.endFrame(). moved() is a small helper for non-zero length.
